name: L'Oréal
description: L'Oréal is a French personal care company and the world's largest cosmetics company, specializing in hair color, skin care, sun protection, make-up, perfume, and hair care.

name: MAC Cosmetics
description: M·A·C Cosmetics is a world-leading brand of professional cosmetics, renowned for its unrivaled expertise in makeup artistry and celebrated diversity.

name: Estée Lauder
description: Estée Lauder is a global leader in prestige beauty, offering high-performance skincare, makeup, and iconic fragrances.

name: Clinique
description: Clinique is a clinical brand of skincare and cosmetics, allergy-tested and 100% fragrance-free, designed for maximum skin health.

name: Maybelline
description: Maybelline New York is the world's number one cosmetics brand, bringing trendsetting makeup from the catwalk to the sidewalk.

name: NARS
description: NARS Cosmetics is a French cosmetics and skin care company founded by makeup artist and photographer François Nars, celebrating individuality through high-fashion colors.

name: Sephora
description: Sephora is a French multinational retailer of personal care and beauty products, offering a unique retail environment for premium beauty discovery.

name: The Ordinary
description: The Ordinary is an evolving collection of treatments offering familiar, effective clinical technologies positioned to raise pricing and communication integrity in skincare.

name: Fenty Beauty
description: Fenty Beauty is a cosmetics brand launched by singer Rihanna, focusing on inclusivity across a wide range of traditionally hard-to-match skin tones.

name: INIKA Organic
description: INIKA Organic is an Australian pioneer in certified organic makeup and skincare, offering pure, healthy beauty without compromise.

name: Dior Beauty
description: Dior Beauty offers luxurious makeup, skincare, and prestigious fragrances, embodying French elegance and haute couture excellence.
